positive: A symmetrical, intricate, and highly stylized celestial botanical illustration. The design features interlocking elements of stylized crescent moons, luminous constellations, exotic flora (such as stylized ferns and lilies), and geometric patterns. The composition must have a strong, clean silhouette, high contrast, and be centered for easy scaling. Color palette direction: Deep indigo, ethereal gold, and soft teal accents. Style: Neo-traditional tattoo flash art meets clean vector illustration, highly detailed, perfect for apparel print, minimal background.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, low quality, artifact, distorted, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grainy, jpeg artifacts, realistic photo, gradient sky, busy background
